title: Knife Ghost
body:
|

Want to host a server with Knife Ghost?

| |:------------------------------------------------------------------------------------:| | | | **Rent your own Minecraft server here!** | Made for SpookyJam 2024 Try your hand at carving a pumpkin with a sword, but be careful! The knife ghost might not be happy with your poor carving efforts! Perhaps you can take one of their knives for yourself if you can kill the ghost while the knife is stuck into something.
